title: Review: wolfhsm-src and wolfhsm-sys crates
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — 2 correctness bugs (CMAC key material leak, silent file skip) + link order bug will cause test failures; all fixable before wolfhsm crate ships.
Confidence: 25% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: wh_Client_AesGcm/Cmac API behavior with NULL args not fully verified from source; wolfHSM key import behavior in shims not tested end-to-end. Would raise confidence if: integration tests pass against a live wolfHSM server or the mem-transport mock.
